_description: GRAO cron payload update — adds known-failures ingestion before proposal generation

new_steps.name: Ingest Known-Failures
new_steps.description: Before generating proposals, ALWAYS read known-failures.json and SCAR file. Suppress any proposals targeting known-failed paths. Redirect to known workarounds.
actions: For each proposed action: check if target path matches known-failures suppressed_methods
If match: suppress proposal, redirect to priority_workarounds entry
Log: suppression_count, redirected_to_workaround in cycle log
Update: learning_rate = learned_entries / total_failures_logged in known-failures.json

modified_steps.name: Generate proposals
modified_steps.modified_action: Run proposal-generator with known-failures filter active
modified_steps.notes: proposal-generator must check known-failures suppressed_methods before outputting proposals

cycle_log_additions.description: Whether known-failures store was checked this cycle
Count of proposals suppressed due to known-failures
List of redirect paths from failed → workaround

implementation_notes: This update requires gateway config patch to modify TPG-GRAO-AutoEvolution cron payload
cron payload is stored in gateway config, not workspace files
Use openclaw cron update or gateway config patch to apply
After patch: verify cron runs with new step by checking cycle log output
